creator: alexey@renatasystems.org
text:
The MultipleRepositorySupport branch has been merged in trunk, in r9125[1]. So
there is no need to use www/trac-multirepos anymore. It is safe to simply
switch from www/trac-multirepos to www/trac.

Deprecate port until 10 october and delete it afterwards.

[1] http://trac.edgewall.org/changeset/9125
